Edit setup

Risk rating setup

Edit Initial Risk Rating and Residual Risk Rating by Ref.No. Example format: High\nB5, Medium\nC4, Very Low\nE1. Changes are saved in this browser and used by Risk Assessment immediately.

Both initial and residual risk rating are editable.

Risk Assessment

Initial and residual risk ratings are colour-coded and can be edited in Edit setup.

Zone map

Click Edit, then drag, add or delete geofence pins manually.
Edit mode is ON: drag orange pins smoothly. Click a pin to select it. Use + Add pin to insert a midpoint after the selected pin, or Delete pin to remove the selected pin. Saving will keep the edited pins visible and editable.
